# sweph

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/sweph"
```

Package sweph provides thread\-safe Go bindings to the Swiss Ephemeris C library via CGO. All calls are serialized through a global mutex because the underlying C library is not thread\-safe.

Init must be called before any calculations to set the ephemeris file path. CalcUT computes planet positions, Houses returns house cusps and angles, and JulDay/RevJul convert between calendar dates and Julian Day numbers.

## Constants

<a name="SE_SUN"></a>Planet IDs matching Swiss Ephemeris constants

```go
const (
    SE_SUN       = C.SE_SUN
    SE_MOON      = C.SE_MOON
    SE_MERCURY   = C.SE_MERCURY
    SE_VENUS     = C.SE_VENUS
    SE_MARS      = C.SE_MARS
    SE_JUPITER   = C.SE_JUPITER
    SE_SATURN    = C.SE_SATURN
    SE_URANUS    = C.SE_URANUS
    SE_NEPTUNE   = C.SE_NEPTUNE
    SE_PLUTO     = C.SE_PLUTO
    SE_CHIRON    = C.SE_CHIRON
    SE_TRUE_NODE = C.SE_TRUE_NODE
    SE_MEAN_NODE = C.SE_MEAN_NODE
    SE_MEAN_APOG = C.SE_MEAN_APOG // Mean Lilith
    SE_OSCU_APOG = C.SE_OSCU_APOG // True Lilith
)
```

<a name="SEFLG_SWIEPH"></a>Calculation flags

```go
const (
    SEFLG_SWIEPH = C.SEFLG_SWIEPH
    SEFLG_SPEED  = C.SEFLG_SPEED
)
```

<a name="HousePlacidus"></a>House system chars

```go
const (
    HousePlacidus      = 'P'
    HouseKoch          = 'K'
    HouseEqual         = 'E'
    HouseWholeSign     = 'W'
    HouseCampanus      = 'C'
    HouseRegiomontanus = 'R'
    HousePorphyry      = 'O'
    HouseMorinus       = 'M'
    HouseTopocentric   = 'T' // Polich-Page
    HouseAlcabitius    = 'B'
    HouseMeridian      = 'X' // Axial rotation / Meridian
)
```

<a name="SE_HELIACAL_RISING"></a>Heliacal event type constants

```go
const (
    SE_HELIACAL_RISING  = 1
    SE_HELIACAL_SETTING = 2
    SE_EVENING_FIRST    = 3
    SE_MORNING_LAST     = 4
)
```

## func [Init](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L108>)

```go
func Init(ephePath string)
```

<a name="CalcResult"></a>
## type [CalcResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L82-L90>)

CalcResult holds the result of a planet calculation

```go
type CalcResult struct {
    Longitude    float64
    Latitude     float64
    Distance     float64
    SpeedLong    float64
    SpeedLat     float64
    SpeedDist    float64
    IsRetrograde bool
}
```

<a name="CalcUT"></a>
### func [CalcUT](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L133>)

```go
func CalcUT(jdUT float64, planet int) (*CalcResult, error)
```

CalcUT calculates planet position at given Julian Day UT

<a name="HeliacalResult"></a>
## type [HeliacalResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L255-L259>)

HeliacalResult holds the result of a heliacal event calculation

```go
type HeliacalResult struct {
    JDStart   float64 // Start of visibility event
    JDOptimum float64 // Optimal observation time
    JDEnd     float64 // End of visibility event
}
```

<a name="HeliacalUT"></a>
### func [HeliacalUT](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L265>)

```go
func HeliacalUT(jdStart float64, geoLon, geoLat, geoAlt float64, objectName string, eventType int) (*HeliacalResult, error)
```

HeliacalUT finds the next heliacal event for an object after jdStart. geoLon, geoLat, geoAlt are the observer's geographic coordinates \(degrees, meters\). objectName is the planet name \(e.g., "venus", "mercury"\). eventType is one of SE\_HELIACAL\_RISING, SE\_HELIACAL\_SETTING, SE\_EVENING\_FIRST, SE\_MORNING\_LAST.

<a name="HouseResult"></a>
## type [HouseResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/sweph/sweph.go#L93-L100>)

HouseResult holds house cusp and angle data

```go
type HouseResult struct {
    Cusps  [13]float64 // index 1-12 = house cusps
    ASC    float64
    MC     float64
    ARMC   float64
    Vertex float64
    EqASC  float64 // East Point (equatorial ascendant)
}
```

```go
func Houses(jdUT float64, lat, lon float64, hsys int) (*HouseResult, error)
```

Houses calculates house cusps and angles
